Package recoder.java.declaration

Interface MemberDeclaration

All Superinterfaces:
Declaration, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnnotationDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, ClassInitializer, ConstructorDeclaration, EnumClassDeclaration, EnumConstantDeclaration, EnumDeclaration, FieldDeclaration, InterfaceDeclaration, MethodDeclaration, TypeDeclaration, TypeParameterDeclaration
public interface MemberDeclaration extends Declaration
Member declaration.
